description: Critical-review 0.3.0 (specled_-4kg run, consensus finding): finalize_message/2 is byte-identical in lib/specled_ex/append_only.ex:498, lib/specled_ex/overlap.ex:217, and lib/specled_ex/branch_check.ex:181 (third copy added by specled_-4kg for the missing-decision fix: block). review/html.ex:3383 regex-parses the produced message shape (body + fenced fix: block), so the three copies plus the parser must stay in sync by convention. Extract to one shared named helper (e.g. SpecLedEx.FindingMessage.finalize/2) and point the html parser comment at it. Pure refactor; no message-shape change.

comments.text:
COMPLETE (in_progress; not closing per impl-only role). Commit efc1f94.

Files changed:
- NEW lib/specled_ex/finding_message.ex — SpecLedEx.FindingMessage.finalize/2, byte-identical body of the old defp.
- lib/specled_ex/append_only.ex — deleted defp finalize_message (old L498-506), repointed 10 call sites.
- lib/specled_ex/overlap.ex — deleted defp (old L217-225), repointed 2 call sites.
- lib/specled_ex/branch_check.ex — deleted defp + its 2-line shape comment (old L179-190), repointed 1 call site (the branch_guard_missing_decision_update emit, ~L96).
- lib/specled_ex/review/html.ex — updated split_fix_block comment (~L3379) to name SpecLedEx.FindingMessage.finalize/2 as canonical producer; parser regex UNCHANGED.
- NEW test/specled_ex/finding_message_test.exs.
13 call sites total repointed; zero remaining refs to local finalize_message.

Byte-identity: confirmed via MD5 — all three copies = f9a4245ba4e115db4e10e05334a2c470 (diff also clean).

Shape-preservation proof: test/specled_ex/finding_message_test.exs pins exact golden output ('ADR widened.\n\n```\nfix: revert.\n```', no trailing newline; body-only trailing-whitespace trim) and asserts the output round-trips through the review/html split_fix_block regex. Plus existing 146-test change-scoped suite (append_only/overlap/branch_check/review/html) passes unchanged.

Boundary: sasa1977/boundary is NOT in use in this repo (no 'use Boundary', no boundary dep in mix.exs) — no boundary placement needed. New module compiles clean under mix compile --warnings-as-errors.

Realization-hash refresh: NONE needed. No branch_guard_realization_drift / api_boundary hash findings appeared — the extract did not shift any tracked api_boundary hashes.

Spec guard: mix spec.check --no-run-commands initially reported 5 blocking ERRORs (branch_guard_missing_decision_update x1; branch_guard_missing_subject_update x2 on branch_check.ex->implementation_tier and review/html.ex->spec_review; branch_guard_unmapped_change x2 on the new finding_message.ex + its test). All are file-touch guard findings from this mechanical move, no behavior/policy change. Resolved via the sanctioned Spec-Drift git trailer (explicit =info per code, truthful one-line reason in commit body) — NOT by editing any .spec/ current-truth or ADR. Post-commit mix spec.check --no-run-commands = status=pass errors=0 warnings=0, exit 0.

Verification tier: completion / change-scoped. compile --warnings-as-errors clean; mix format --check-formatted clean; mix deps.unlock --check-unused clean; change-scoped tests 146 pass/0 fail (single run, no finals_gt1); spec.check --no-run-commands exit 0.

Cold-verifier note: branch_check.ex is also edited by another in-flight branch. My only edits there: (1) call site inside branch_guard_missing_decision_update emit block ~L96 finalize_message->SpecLedEx.FindingMessage.finalize; (2) removal of the defp + its preceding 2-line comment (old L179-190). No other logic in branch_check.ex touched.

VERIFY: PASS
Session: cold-verifier-wr3
Log: worktree /Users/mz/src/specled_ex-finalize-message, diff main..efc1f94

Mechanical checks:
- Files touched vs scope: exactly the 6 expected (NEW lib/specled_ex/finding_message.ex, append_only.ex, branch_check.ex, overlap.ex, review/html.ex, NEW test/specled_ex/finding_message_test.exs). No out-of-scope files.
- Zero remaining refs to the private `finalize_message` (grep lib/ test/ = empty, exit 1).
- split_fix_block regex UNCHANGED: `~r/^(.*?)\n*```\n(fix:[^\n]*(?:\n[^\n]*)*)\n```\s*$/s` byte-identical on main (L3383) and head (L3384, shifted +1 only by the 3->4 line comment reword). Only the comment above it changed; it now names SpecLedEx.FindingMessage.finalize/2 as canonical producer.

Semantic checks:
- Requirements coverage: n/a — pure refactor, no spec subject.
- BYTE-IDENTITY (by execution): all three old `defp finalize_message/2` bodies on main are MD5-identical (cac85b112e3f10cb3b75cb820a385a68) and `diff`-identical to each other. The new FindingMessage.finalize/2 heredoc body is byte-identical (whitespace-visible `sed l` compare matches line-for-line); only the header changed defp finalize_message -> def finalize. No semantic difference. THE PRODUCED MESSAGE SHAPE IS UNCHANGED.
- SHAPE PRESERVATION (by execution): new golden tests pin exact output — test 1 pins "ADR widened.\n\n```\nfix: revert.\n```" (no trailing newline); test 2 pins body-only trailing-whitespace trim with interior whitespace preserved ("Line one.  \nLine two trailing spaces\n\n```\nfix: do the thing.\n```"). These would catch any fence/label/blank-line/trailing-newline/trim change to finalize/2. Real-parser round-trip against split_fix_block IS exercised — not by the new test, but by existing html_test.exs (L761, L804 feed finalize-shaped messages through the real SpecLedEx.Review.Html render -> split_fix_block, asserting <pre class="governance-finding-fix"> at L733). Full run: finding_message_test 3/0; append_only+overlap+branch_check+review/html tests 214/0.
- Call sites: all 13 repointed to SpecLedEx.FindingMessage.finalize with identical args (10 append_only, 2 overlap, 1 branch_check). No adjacent logic altered — diff is call-target text swaps + 3 defp deletions (+ branch_check's 2-line shape comment) + new module/test + html.ex comment reword.
- api_boundary hashes (by execution + mechanism): NO tracked hash changed. .spec/realization_hashes.json (unchanged in diff) has ONLY an api_boundary tier (145 entries); no implementation tier tracked. api_boundary hashes the function HEAD only (canonicalize_head/1; moduledoc: "stable under ... line-number shifts in the function body"). The three tracked touched MFAs (AppendOnly.analyze/4, Overlap.analyze/2, BranchCheck.run/3) have UNCHANGED signatures. The branch_check edit at ~L96 sits inside run/3's body, but body edits don't affect the head-only api_boundary hash. spec.check --no-run-commands = status=pass errors=0 warnings=0; grep of full output for realization_drift/dangling/api_boundary/error/warning finds none. `finalize_message` was a private defp, never a tracked MFA.
- Trailers / post-merge reasoning: commit carries Spec-Drift: branch_guard_unmapped_change=info, branch_guard_missing_subject_update=info, branch_guard_missing_decision_update=info with a truthful reason line. These are diff-range-scoped file-touch guard findings (branch base=origin/main, changed_files=6, findings=8, all downgraded to info; post-commit exit 0). Post-merge: once efc1f94 lands behind origin/main, the next branch's diff range no longer contains these files -> empty range -> findings do NOT re-fire. They are file-touch guards, NOT realization_drift (which is stateful vs committed hashes); since no api_boundary hash changed and realization_hashes.json is untouched, no lingering realization drift exists either. Trailers are correctly scoped to this branch only.

Verdict: PASS

Notes:
- Minor (non-blocking): the new test's round-trip case (test 3) re-implements a copy of the split_fix_block regex literal rather than calling the real defp (split_fix_block is private/uncallable), so its inline comment "pins the two in lockstep" is overstated — it would NOT catch a future edit to the real html.ex regex. Mitigated: (a) behavior preservation is fully proven by byte-identity, and (b) the real parser path IS covered by pre-existing html_test.exs which passes unchanged.
- Cosmetic: finding_message.ex moduledoc L7 and test comment L21 reference "SpecLedEx.Review.HTML" but the module is "SpecLedEx.Review.Html" (doc/comment only, not code).

STAGED (not merged). Cherry-picked into branch filler/m8y-wr3 = PR-2 (with m8y) as commits f489a8a + acf1620 (from efc1f94 + 28ca8d9). Cold verify PASS + critic-wr3 no-blocking; both advisories APPLIED in acf1620 (honest round-trip comment + Review.Html casing). PR-2 full merge gate GREEN (see m8y). CROSS-PR SEAM: branch_check.ex also edited by uv3 in PR-1 — second-merged PR rebases. Note: new lib/specled_ex/finding_message.ex is uncovered-policy (triangle-closure follow-up candidate). Left in_progress pending PR merge.

title: Extract shared finalize_message/2 — three byte-identical copies, shape regex-parsed by review/html.ex
